description_long: This house features a large, steeply pitched hip roof in a neutral beige color, covering a two-story main structure with a modern, clean-lined facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or off-white material, punctuated by large rectangular and arched windows that provide ample natural light. The front facade includes a double-door entryway with a subtle arch and symmetrical window placement, while the side extension features a balcony with a white railing and green flooring. The rear of the house displays expansive glass doors and windows, suggesting access to a patio or backyard area. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with metal-framed windows and doors.
description: A two-story house with a steep hip roof, light gray walls, and large rectangular and arched windows. Features include a front double-door entry, a side balcony, and expansive rear glass doors.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with double doors, six large windows, and the prominent hip roof.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the side extension with a balcony, white railing, and a garage door below.
description_view_2: The rear view displays wide glass doors and windows, emphasizing openness to the backyard or patio.
description_view_3: The right side view features two large arched windows and a simpler facade with fewer details.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a mix of rectangular and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a subtle arch, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
